name: Rampage Ball 2048
short_description: Rampage Ball is a modern twist on a classic arcade game. It combines the gameplay of Arkanoid with RPG elements, allowing players to earn experience points and level up as they progress through the game. The game has an idle arcade feel as you progress through the levels and become more powerful.
detailed_description:
In this exciting game, players have the opportunity to earn experience points and level up as they progress through the levels.
As you level up, you'll earn ability points that can be used to upgrade your ball and unlock new abilities.

Game features:

Arkanoid RPG mechanics

There are three ways to upgrade your ball:
Damage
Critical
Split

As you progress through the game, the blocks will increase in life every three levels, adding an extra layer of challenge.
The game has an idle arcade feel as you continue to level up and become more powerful.
Have fun and see how far you can go!
